channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Bay Area high school basketball: Friday’s championship scores, Saturday’s schedule
item.description: Results from Friday night's Central Coast Section, North Coast Section championship games, Saturday's schedule.
item.dc:creator: Darren Sabedra, The Mercury News

item.title: CMU Baseball explodes at the plate for dominant double-header sweep
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — On an absolutely picturesque day for baseball at The Diamond at the Bus Bergman Sports Complex, CMU trailed MSU Billings 2-0 early. A 2-run shot to right by MSU's River Smith in the top of the 2nd put the Mavs in a hole.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5

item.title: Cavaliers' comeback win over Celtics give them confidence they can compete with defending champs
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — With Celtics fans in a frenzy throughout TD Garden after the Boston Celtics blitzed to a 25-3 lead over the Cavaliers in the final matchup of Eastern Conference frontrunners, Cleveland star Donovan Mitchell didn't panic. He actually was in a calm place.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Mitchell scores 41, Cavaliers overcome 22-point deficit to beat the Celtics 123-116
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 41 points, including 12 in the fourth quarter, to help the Cleveland Cavaliers rally from 22 points down and stun the Boston Celtics 123-116 on Friday night in the final regular-season meeting of the Eastern Conference’s top two teams.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: JuJu Watkins and No. 4 USC visit No. 2 UCLA in winner-take-all game for Big Ten regular-season title
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — It’s probably not what the Big Ten expected when the league opened its doors to UCLA and USC this season: two West Coast schools dominating the women’s basketball standings.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards suspended 1 game by NBA after picking up 16th technical foul
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Minnesota Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards was suspended one game without pay by the NBA on Friday after picking up his 16th technical foul of the season during the third quarter against the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Dodgers star Shohei Ohtani hits HR in 1st spring at-bat following offseason shoulder surgery
item.description: Los Angeles Dodgers slugger Shohei Ohtani hit a solo home run in his first spring training plate appearance following offseason shoulder surgery.
item.dc:creator: David Brandt, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: QB Matthew Stafford gets a restructured contract and agrees to stay with the Los Angeles Rams
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Quarterback Matthew Stafford is staying with the Los Angeles Rams under a restructured contract, ending weeks of speculation about the Super Bowl winner's future. The Rams announced their new agreement with Stafford on Friday without initially revealing any details.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: Where to watch outside Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: After a stunning win against the Los Angeles Galaxy in its Major League Soccer debut, San Diego FC is set to make its first-ever appearance on the club's home turf on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Knapp goes from a 59 to a 70 but still has the lead in the Cognizant Classic
item.description: Jake Knapp still has the lead at the Cognizant Classic even though it felt like a tough day at the office.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Jordan Chiles explains why she thinks she will 'never' talk to Simone Biles about Larry Nassar's abuse
item.description: While Jordan Chiles and Simone Biles have made history together, Chiles said she will likely "never" discuss Larry Nassar with Biles, one of his victims.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers say they're reinstating Jon Gruden into their ring of honor
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers say they're reinstating former coach Jon Gruden into the team's ring of honor less than four years after removing him over his use of racist, homophobic and misogynistic language in emails he wrote to an NFL executive.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Utah wins third straight, dominating Minnesota, 6-1
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Clayton Keller tallied a career-high five points (one goal, four assists) and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Minnesota Wild 6-1 at Delta Center on Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Davis beats Herriman to win 6A state title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - In a battle of the top two 6A boys basketball teams, Davis proved to be the best in the state. Coleman Atwater poured in 24 points, while Bode Sparrow added 16 as the #2 seeded Darts knocked off top-seeded Herriman, 75-66.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: No. 15 Michigan beats Rutgers 84-82 on Burnett's 3-pointer at buzzer, moves into 1st-place tie
item.description: ANN ARBOR, Mich. (AP) — Nimari Burnett made a long 3-pointer at the buzzer, lifting No. 15 Michigan to an 84-82 win over Rutgers on Thursday night and into a first-place tie in the Big Ten with rival Michigan State. The Wolverines (22-6, 14-3 Big Ten) rallied after trailing by 12 in the second half.
item.dc:creator: LARRY LAGE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Maine House speaker deletes X account after censuring lawmaker opposed to transgender athletes in girls sports
item.description: The Maine House of Representatives' Democratic speaker, Ryan Fecteau, deleted his X account days after censuring Republican Rep. Laurel Libby.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Myles Garrett, Browns at odds about his future with team; star lineman not open to extension: report
item.description: Despite the Cleveland Browns insisting they will not trade defensive end Myles Garrett, the star lineman appears to be sticking to his trade request.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Boys Basketball: St. Augustine 62, Sage Creek 39
item.description: Lead by PPR Gala Awards Special Teams Player of the Year Pai Polamalu, the Saintsmen handily beat the Bobcats 62-39 to advance to the D1 finals against Victory Christian Academy.
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Aggies go cold in 82-65 loss at Boise State
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Utah State saw a five-game winning streak over Boise State come to an end Wednesday night at ExtraMile Arena, falling to the Broncos in an 82-65 road battle.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz lose to Kings on Kessler's big night, 118-101
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Despite a season-high 25 points and 14 points from Walker Kessler, the Utah Jazz lost to the Sacramento Kings Wednesday night at the Delta Center, 118-101. Keegan Murray scored a season-high 26 points and Zach Levine added 22 to lift the hot-shooting Kings.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Softball: Christian 5, El Capitan 3
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Spring sports underway with Christian beating El Capitan on Monday afternoon 5-3. Patriots were lead by Ava Barrios, Long Beach State commit was dominate in the circle going five innings with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Giddey scores 25 points as the Bulls snap a 6-game skid with a 142-110 rout of the 76ers
item.description: Josh Giddey had 25 points, 16 rebounds and six assists as the Chicago Bulls ended a six-game skid by routing the Philadelphia 76ers 142-110 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Cleveland Guardians owner Lawrence J. Dolan dies at 94
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lawrence J. Dolan, owner of Cleveland's Major League Baseball team since 2000, has died. He was 94. Dolan died Sunday night of natural causes, the Cleveland Guardians said Monday in a statement. “Mr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: San Diego FC wins inaugural match against LA Galaxy 2-0
item.description: San Diego FC dominated its inaugural match against LA Galaxy 2-0 in the 30th MLS season, scoring its first-ever goal in the 52nd minute.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: BYU wins thriller over #19 Arizona, 96-95
item.description: TUCSON, Ariz. (ABC4 Sports) - Richie Saunders scored a team-high 23 points including two free throws in the final seconds as BYU defeated No. 19 Arizona 96-96 on Saturday evening at a sold out McKale Center.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Keyonte George scores 30 in Jazz win over Rockets
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George scored 30 points and Lauri Markkanen added 23 points and 10 rebounds to rally the Utah Jazz to a 124-115 victory over the Houston Rockets on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
